claim3_4_bounded_optimal_of_exact_alloca.tex_statement: \forall {SourceAgent : Type u_1} {SourceItem : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype SourceAgent] [Fintype SourceItem] [inst_2 : Nonempty SourceAgent] [DecidableEq SourceAgent] [inst_4 : DecidableEq SourceItem] {goods : Finset SourceItem} {v : SourceItem \to ℝ} {L : ℝ} (A₀ : Allocation SourceAgent SourceItem), IsOptimalRatio (fun A  =>  loadRatio (minCommonLoad v A) (maxCommonLoad v A)) A₀ \to (\forall (A : Allocation SourceAgent SourceItem), IsOptimalRatio (fun C  =>  loadRatio (minCommonLoad v C) (maxCommonLoad v C)) A \to IsAllocationOf A goods) \to 0 < L \to commonLoad v goods = ↑(card SourceAgent) * L \to (\forall (A : Allocation SourceAgent SourceItem), IsOptimalRatio (fun C  =>  loadRatio (minCommonLoad v C) (maxCommonLoad v C)) A \to (\lnot\forall (i : SourceAgent), boundedAroundAverage L (commonLoad v (A i))) \to \forall (i : SourceAgent), \exists g, g \in A i) \to (\forall g \in goods, 0 < v g) \to (\forall g \in goods, v g < L) \to \exists B, IsAllocationOf B goods \land Claim34Certificate v L (fun A  =>  loadRatio (minCommonLoad v A) (maxCommonLoad v A)) (fun A i  =>  A i) B

envy.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
envy.tex_statement: (v : Valuation Agent Item) (A : Allocation Agent Item) (i j : Agent) = max 0 (v.value i (A j) - v.value i (A i))

envyBoundedBy.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
envyBoundedBy.tex_statement: (v : Valuation Agent Item) (A : Allocation Agent Item) (alpha : ℝ) = \forall i j, envy v A i j \le alpha

envyFree.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
envyFree.tex_statement: (v : Valuation Agent Item) (A : Allocation Agent Item) = \forall i j, v.value i (A j) \le v.value i (A i)
